title: Fix 10 easy bugs + write tests (session resume)
objective: Fix all 10 top-priority critical bugs from code review across 2 sessions + commit + push
scope: 15+ Kotlin files across audio, camera, network, agent, service, data layers + ProGuard + XML resources + tests
completed: Report current project state: 8 checkpoints, 11 modified files, 4 untracked files, 8 git commits
- ToolDefinitions: lowercase JSON schema types (OBJECT->object, STRING->string, etc.)
- MemoryDbHelper: escape % and _ in LIKE queries
- GoogleDriveServiceHelper: escape single quotes (SQL injection fix)
- XML resources: remove Sample template comments
- MeetingActivity: replace Thread.sleep(500) with async pattern
- MeetingActivity: replace prepare() with prepareAsync() (ANR fix)
- FloatingWidgetService: move startForeground() to top of onCreate()
- FloatingWidgetService: WeakReference for companion instance (leak fix)
- SmartNotificationListenerService: strip message body from Gemini prompt (privacy)
- MeetingRecordingService: Channel UNLIMITED -> BUFFERED + DROP_OLDEST (OOM fix)
- AudioRecorder: join recording thread before release (SIGSEGV fix)
- CameraCaptureHelper: @Volatile stopped flag + check in onOpened (race fix)
Update checkpoint 8 JSON with completed status and full artifact list

decisions.decision: WeakReference for FloatingWidgetService.instance แทน direct reference
decisions.rationale: Static field hold GC root ทำให้ service leak — WeakReference ปล่อยให้ GC เก็บ service ได้เมื่อไม่มี reference อื่น
alternatives: Keep direct reference with lifecycle management

knowledge: Gemini Live API requires lowercase JSON Schema types (object, string, integer) — uppercase silently ignored → tools receive empty args
MediaPlayer.prepare() is synchronous and blocks main thread for large audio files → use prepareAsync()
FloatingWidgetService must call startForeground() immediately in onCreate() or Android kills the service with 'did not call startForeground()'
CompletableDeferred.await() without timeout can hang forever if callback is never invoked → wrap in withTimeout(30_000)
Channel(UNLIMITED) in streaming pipeline causes OOM under backpressure → use BUFFERED capacity + BufferOverflow.DROP_OLDEST
ProGuard -repackageclasses moves all classes into single package → breaks AndroidManifest component references → ClassNotFoundException
PowerShell 5.1 script parameters need escaped JSON for complex types — use double-quoting carefully
SQLite LIKE wildcards % and _ need escaping when searching user input — use ESCAPE clause
next_steps: Build APK and deploy to connected phone for real-device testing
Run BugFixVerificationTest on device to verify all fixes
Address remaining Major issues from bug report (35+ Major items)
Run code review on FloatingWidgetService WeakReference pattern safety

All changes commit and pushed to GitHub. Working tree clean.
